_provenance_notes: Imported SNIPS NLU benchmark / PlayMusic intent (Apache-2.0). Slot map: track->song, sort->rating, artist/album/genre/year preserved; service/music_item/playlist dropped. (1405 examples added to training set, seed=2026).

Imported CPCD (Google Research, CC-BY 4.0) joined with Doh et al. ISMIR'24 intent annotations (seungheondoh/cpcd-intent). Intent labels from Doh; artist/song spans matched against CPCD's per-dialog track metadata; genre/mood/tempo/energy/year/time_range tagged via domain vocabulary substring match. (722 examples added to training set, seed=2026).

Imported user_curated_v1: real-user-style queries covering gaps in synthetic+SNIPS+CPCD — dash song-similarity, multi-artist, top-songs-of-X, numeric BPM tempo, hyphenated tempo descriptors, vocal-style words, short multi-attribute descriptions. (66 examples added to training set, seed=4242).
Imported curated_ai_v2: 2000 AI-generated examples preserved from previous training run, restored after full regeneration pipeline. (1600 examples added to training set, seed=5555).
Augmented from existing training data with carrier-phrase, synonym, word-order, and casing/punctuation paraphrases. (832 examples added to training set, seed=7777).
